title: Xtra Malty Southern Thai Chicken Nam Prik
description: A malty and pillowy Southern Thai dish featuring tomato sauce, perfect for midnight cravings. This high-protein-friendly nam prik is a unique twist on traditional Thai cuisine.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the malt syrup, tomato sauce, fish sauce, and lime juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Add the chopped Thai red chili peppers, garlic, and shallots to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened to your liking.
Serve the nam prik hot, garnished with additional shallots and chili peppers if desired.
